events.agenda: 18:30 Doors open; 19:00 Presentation/conversation with Jeremy Cohen + Q&A; 19:40-21:30 Networking, swag, drinks and snacks.
events.event_description: A special dbt Global Circuit Series stop featuring Jeremy Cohen, Principal Product Manager at dbt Labs, showcasing the latest dbt features in a hands-on, conversational format, held in French.
events.location: Le Mangrove, 154 Rue de Rome, Marseille
events.raw_text:
Tue, Jun 10, 2025 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM CEST

19.00: Présentation/Conversation avec Jeremy Cohen (jerco) @ dbt Labs + Q&A

talks.description: A walkthrough of the latest dbt features and updates, with hands-on interaction and Q&A, presented in French.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Jeremy Cohen (Jerco) de dbt labs nous fera le plaisir de faire la presentation et faciliter la conversation.
talks.title: dbt Global Circuit Series: Marseille - Latest dbt updates
